data.name: Villain Academy
data.detailed_description:
About This Game

Villain Academy

Welcome to Villain Academy, where darkness meets destiny. Ancient knowledge awaits those who dare to seek it, and hidden secrets lie beneath the surface.

Can you master the dark arts?

Game Overview

Villain Academy is a dark fantasy visual novel set in a mysterious academy where students learn to harness forbidden powers. Navigate a world of magic, shadows, and temptation as you interact with extraordinary characters, each with their own dark secrets and hidden agendas.

Features

- Five Compelling Characters: Each with their own unique powers and motivations

- Dark Fantasy Setting: Explore mysterious locations from classrooms to dungeons

- Multiple Paths: Choose between embracing darkness or seeking redemption

- Atmospheric Locations: Discover the academy's secrets through its many halls

- Character-Driven Story: Build relationships with witches, vampires, dark elves, succubi, and angels

Story

You've been accepted into Villain Academy, a prestigious institution where the most powerful dark magic users train. As a new student, you'll encounter five extraordinary individuals: a powerful witch, a seductive vampire, a mysterious dark elf, a tempting succubus, and an angel who has chosen to walk a darker path. Each holds secrets that could change everything.

Content Warning

This game contains mature themes including dark fantasy elements, supernatural themes, and adult situations. Recommended for mature audiences only.

data.short_description: A dark fantasy visual novel set in Villain Academy. Interact with supernatural characters including witches, vampires, dark elves, succubi, and fallen angels. Make choices that shape your path as you build relationships and uncover secrets.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs 10.10 or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core MUbuntu 16.04.7 or later

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04.7 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
